race.comment: POINTLESS PRAISE (12) led and bolted in at Bunbury last start in an easier race, but he ran a figure that stacks right up in a race of this calibre. Likely to find the front again for Louis and if he can replicate what he did last time, he'll be hard to hold out. CITINO (3) jumps right out in distance fourth-up into the campaign. Grantham is having success with runners who profile similarly and Pike hopping on board is a big push for his chances. Out to this trip now is a big tick for him and with a good fitness base under him, he looks ready to fire. DUCHEES DEMERIT (10) is racing well without winning, disappointing last start but he only just missed two back. Should get his chance from the inside draw and carries no weight today with the claim of Riordan. Can put his best foot forward. KISSES FROM KELLY (1) was too good from the front last start and can repeat the dose. SAVVY RULER (14) is better than she showed last start and can bounce back.
